title: Stakeholders, Ethics, Accessibility, and Harm Analysis · Product Forensics
summary: A preserved decision record for stakeholders, ethics, accessibility, and harm analysis contains one plausible evidence, scope, design, implementation, evaluation, or ownership defect. Find the first unsupported claim before changing the product. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in stakeholder benefit-burden and harm register and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugg…
objectives: Map benefit, burden, exposure, voice, authority, recourse, and accountability across users and affected non-users.
Apply public good, harm avoidance, honesty, fairness, privacy, competence, review, and accountability to concrete project conflicts.
Treat disability, language, literacy, device, connectivity, environment, and support needs as core system requirements and research conditions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# capstone-project cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: capstone-project
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Stakeholder Power Map
steps.instruction:
debug case — Primary-user convenience shifts surveillance, exclusion, labor, safety, environmental, and appeal costs onto people with less product power. The debug variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Map benefit, burden, exposure, voice, authority, recourse, and accountability across users and affected non-users.

Inspect the Stakeholder Power Map trace for this debug case. Which record connects a precondition, observed state change, and boundary result?

Evidence target: Inspect the failure record · Debug Stakeholder Power Map.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for map benefit, burden, exposure, voice, authority, recourse, and accountability across users and affected non-users. For Inspect the failure record · Debug Stakeholder Power Map, keep Stakeholder Power Map connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: For Stakeholder Power Map, distinguish a claim from evidence by locating the relevant precondition, trace or invariant, and changed input result.

hints: For Inspect the failure record · Debug Stakeholder Power Map, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Stakeholder Power Map precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Inspect the failure record · Debug Stakeholder Power Map, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: Primary-user convenience shifts surveillance, exclusion, labor, safety, environmental, and appeal costs onto people with less product power. The debug variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Map benefit, burden, exposure, voice, authority, recourse, and accountability across users and affected non-users.

For Inspect the failure record · Debug Stakeholder Power Map, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Stakeholder importance is proportional to purchasing power.

stimulus.title: Stakeholder Power Map case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: Primary-user convenience shifts surveillance, exclusion, labor, safety, environmental, and appeal costs onto people with less product power. The debug variation 3 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: Map benefit, burden, exposure, voice, authority, recourse, and accountability across users and affected non-users.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Stakeholder importance is proportional to purchasing power.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Map benefit, burden, exposure, voice, authority, recourse, and accountability across users and affected non-users. Artifact under review: stakeholder benefit-burden and harm register.

options.text: The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the inspect the failure record evidence boundary.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Stakeholder Power Map, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

content.code:

  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]

steps.title: Publish the incident record · Debug Ethics Review Route
steps.instruction:
Write the debug evidence note for Ethics Review Route: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — Primary-user convenience shifts surveillance, exclusion, labor, safety, environmental, and appeal costs onto people with less product power. The debug variation 6 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Route domain, legal, accessibility, safety, privacy, or community questions to qualified review and preserve explicit non-claims.
